channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Why one of the nation's largest auto lenders isn't worried about high vehicle prices or 'forever loans'
item.description: While median car payments have jumped from $390 to $525 since 2019, data provided by Capital One suggests stability in vehicle cost compared to income.

item.title: Nvidia embraces role of AI investor, pushing past $40 billion in equity bets this year
item.description: Nvidia is pouring billions of dollars at a time into companies across the AI infrastructure stack, while also signing commercial deals with them.

item.title: Frontier jet hits and kills pedestrian on runway in Denver during takeoff
item.description: Frontier said that smoke was reported in the cabin of the Airbus A321 and the pilots aborted takeoff.

item.title: U.S., Iran no closer to ending war as Qatari tanker sails toward Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Recent days have seen the biggest flare-ups in fighting in and around the Strait of Hormuz since a ceasefire began a month ago.

item.title: Putin says he thinks Russia-Ukraine war is coming to an end
item.description: "I think that the matter is coming to an end," Putin told reporters of the Ukraine war.

item.title: The Trump-Xi summit is the next major deadline for investors awaiting a resolution to the U.S.-Iran war. Here's what's ahead
item.description: Trump's apparent determination to wrap up the fighting in Iran is part of the reason why the stock market has been unruffled by the ongoing conflict.

item.title: Major crypto bill slated for May 14 Senate Banking Committee vote
item.description: The crypto industry's top legislative priority, a bill determining oversight of digital assets, is set to advance in the Senate Banking Committee.

item.title: The Iran war will change global energy markets in these important ways, oil executives say
item.description: Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has resulted in the loss of nearly a billion barrels of oil with the shortage growing worse every day.

item.title: How to take control of the AI data center boom and built it into your own home in the future
item.description: As public support for large-scale data center buildouts declines across the U.S., a new type designed to operate inside individual homes is coming.

item.title: Bank of America says stocks like Apple have plenty of upside following earnings
item.description: The firm named five stocks that have more room to run following earnings.

item.title: MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak: A luxury expedition cruise boom and new world of remote travel risks
item.description: Remote expedition cruises to destinations like Antarctica and the Arctic are booming, but the deadly hantavirus aboard MV Hondius is a reminder of unique risks.

item.title: There's little chance of a hantavirus global outbreak. What the latest odds say
item.description: Prediction markets like Kalshi show slim chance that the hantavirus outbreak will be of international concern

item.title: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
item.description: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.

item.title: Burger King's president says the chain improved its Whopper — and calls from customers helped
item.description: Burger King President Tom Curtis said customer feedback has been central to the chain’s turnaround.

item.title: U.S. sanctions companies and individuals in the Middle East and China for helping Iran
item.description: The moves target 11 entities and three individuals based in Iran, China, Belarus and the United Arab Emirates.

item.title: Micron and Qualcomm are among the most overbought stocks this week. Here are the others
item.description: A massive rally in memory chip stocks drove them to huge gains this week, but that's also left some of the highest fliers due for a possible decline soon.

item.title: AI-powered scam calls are getting more convincing—and more common: 'It was her voice, I know her scared cry'
item.description: AI can now mimic a familiar voice in seconds, making scam calls harder to spot.

item.title: Michael Burry says the market today feels like 'the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble'
item.description: "Stocks are not up or down because of jobs or consumer sentiment," Burry wrote. "Feeling like the last months of the 1999-2000 bubble."

item.title: Greg Abel knows Berkshire cold, but some miss the Buffett magic
item.description: Greg Abel is getting decent, if not spectacular, reviews for leading his first annual shareholders meeting as CEO.

item.title: S&P 500 extends winning streak to 6 weeks. What drove the stock market gains
item.description: Investors cheered positive earnings, economic data, and a high-profile AI partnership.

item.title: Revival of Blackberry nostalgia and keyboard fuels smartphone startups
item.description: Smartphone startups are bringing back the Blackberry idea through physical keyboards and the classic square-shaped smartphone.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is in June. Get a $150 Amazon gift card and extra rewards with the right credit card
item.description: Amazon Prime Day is coming early this year; it's time to prepare. We explain when the sale is actually worth it and the right cards to use for added perks.

item.title: Dying with a health savings account can leave a tax bomb for heirs
item.description: Non-spouse beneficiaries like children and grandchildren can be on the hook for a big tax bill if they inherit a health savings account.

item.title: U.S. payrolls jump more than expected, but the report had several red flags for the economy
item.description: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 55,000 in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

item.title: Whisky business: Investors pin hopes on Trump’s Scotch tariff reversal after dire three years
item.description: President Trump's decision to ditch the 10% tariff on Scotch whisky could boost the market for premium cask collecting.

item.title: The Federal Reserve is quickly running out of reasons to cut interest rates
item.description: Friday's jobs report provided evidence that the central bank's larger concern is a cost of living that is getting increasingly hard to bear.

item.title: S&P 500 closes at another record, notches longest weekly winning streak since 2024: Live updates
item.description: U.S. equities rose on Friday following a better-than-expected April's jobs report and as traders eyed developments between the U.S. and Iran.

item.title: Consumer sentiment falls to fresh record low in May as surging gas prices hit outlook
item.description: Surging gas prices due to the Iran war sent consumer sentiment to a new low in the early part of May.

item.title: Dunkin' owner Inspire Brands confidentially files for IPO
item.description: The restaurant company owns Dunkin', Arby's, Buffalo Wild Wings, Baskin Robbins, Sonic Drive-In and Jimmy John's.

item.title: Rocket Lab surges 34% in best day ever on revenue beat, record-setting launch deal
item.description: Enthusiasm for space stocks has skyrocketed ahead of SpaceX's anticipated IPO.
